abstract: See the full JSON code from this tutorial.
overview:
## Overview

This page brings together everything from this tutorial as a template that you can use for your News articles. If you followed the steps throughout this tutorial, the following example code should match the code in your `article.json` file.

You can copy this template (which is also the `article.json` file in `News_Design_Tutorial_Advanced_Article_2`) and modify it to create your own News articles with varied layout and positioning. See [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNews/setting-up-the-advanced-tutorials#Download-the-Article-Bundle-Examples]. To preview this article, see [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNews/setting-up-the-introductory-tutorial#Preview-the-Article-Bundle-Examples].

### Previous

[doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNews/adding-a-scene]

### Next

[doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNews/giving-the-article-a-dark-color-scheme]
